paragraph: The single-family market in Rochelle Park is moving decisively in sellers' favor. Eighteen homes sold over six months at a median of $680,000, and the vast majority are closing above asking, with a sale-to-list ratio of 1.053 and a median of 11 days on market. Nearly 89 percent of sales exceeded list price, which signals real competition among buyers when a home hits the market. Prices range from $560,000 to $1,170,000, giving the market some breadth, though the median sits solidly in the mid-range. The speed of sales and frequency of above-asking results tells you that sellers are dictating terms here. Homes priced competitively aren't sitting around. If you're selling, you're in a position to be selective. If you're buying in Rochelle Park, you'll need to move decisively and come prepared to compete.
